title: kaviria tomentosa subsp. tomentosa
intro: Kaviria tomentosa subsp. tomentosa, also known as the hairy kaviria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Kaviria tomentosa subsp. tomentosa can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
